creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
To the user:

We typically require that bug reports be submitted in English. The
vast majority of our committers and other users are not French and
don't speak the language. English is considered the default
"universal" language. Can you please follow up in English explaining
the problem in more detail?


To committers:

<@bapt> he just says he has a problem with kerberos/heimdal loking for
/hdb_ldap.so in the wrong place

-- 
Eitan Adler
